description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the eclipse-temurin:17-jdk-alpine Docker image with a global before_script that installs bash, zip (~3.0) and wget via apk, and a global cache keyed "cache-build" storing the directory cache/build always. Define stages build and test and set variables ARTIFACT_COMPRESSION_LEVEL, CACHE_COMPRESSION_LEVEL, FF_USE_FASTZIP, GIT_DEPTH. Add a hidden .build-oss-job in the build stage that disables caching, runs on pushes to the default branch when any of LICENSES/**, includes/**, tools/*.jar, tools/*.sh, zip-content/**, CHANGELOG.rst, LICENSE*.rst, build.sh or conf-*.sh change, and executes the shell command `BUILD_TYPE='oss' './build.sh'` with a 5‑minute timeout. Add a build-job in the build stage that produces artifacts matching output/*.zip* that expire after 15 minutes, runs on pushes to the default branch with the same file changes, as well as on scheduled or manual pipelines, and runs `BUILD_TYPE='full' './build.sh'` with a 5‑minute timeout. Add a ping-cache job in the build stage that runs only on scheduled pipelines, does not use a before_script, and executes `test ! -d './cache/build' || date -u -- '+%s' 1> './cache/build/last-ping.dat'` to update a timestamp file, also with a 5‑minute timeout.
